name: Ham or Chicken and Vegetable Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place navy beans in a pot and add 3 cups water. Bring to a boil.
2. Boil uncovered for 10 minutes, then drain the beans.
3. Meanwhile, combine vegetables, herbs (parsley flakes, dried thyme), tabasco, and salt in a crockpot.
4. Stir in drained beans and 4 cups water. Place ham hocks or chicken breasts on top of the beans.
5. Cover; cook on low heat setting for 10-12 hours or high heat setting for 4 1/2 to 5 1/2 hours.
6. Before serving, remove ham hocks or chicken from the crockpot. Pull the meat apart and return it to the soup.
7. Leftovers can be frozen well.
